title: K-ESBMC: An Executable Formal Semantics of IEC 61131-3 Ladder Diagram
description: Software artifact for K-ESBMC: the K-framework executable semantics of IEC 61131-3 Ladder Diagram (k-esbmc/ld.k), the OpenPLC/MATIEC fidelity harness (k-esbmc/validation), the differential-oracle frontends and driver (k-esbmc/rung6), and the kprove construct lemmas (k-esbmc/proof).
